revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Dawn PScLim|Dawn PScLim]] ([[User talk:Dawn PScLim|talk]]) to last version by MusikBot II

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Ambiguous]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ambiguous]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects A
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ambiguous]] <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Ambiguous}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Please clarify | text = ambiguous | title = {{{reason|{{{title|The text near this tag is ambiguous, and needs clarification.}}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification }}<!--{{Ambiguous}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Ambiguous}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Please clarify | text = ambiguous | title = {{{reason|{{{title|The text near this tag is ambiguous, and needs clarification.}}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification }}<!--{{Ambiguous}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Ambiguous}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Please clarify | text = ambiguous | title = {{{reason|{{{title|The text near this tag is ambiguous, and needs clarification.}}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification }}<!--{{Ambiguous}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! -->

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ambiguous here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
